proposedActions.name: removeEncoding
proposedActions.reason: Field and datum assignments can be replaced but cannot be explicitly torn down.

proposedActions.name: removePointRadius
proposedActions.reason: Constant point radius is graphical config and must not be confused with the Polar radius channel.

proposedActions.name: editMarkSelection
proposedActions.reason: A stable selection ID has no selector replacement path.

proposedActions.name: removeMarkHighlight
proposedActions.reason: Highlight assignment can be replaced but not returned to the clean mark baseline.

proposedActions.name: removeMarkSelection
proposedActions.reason: Stable selection resources cannot be released independently of mark removal.

proposedActions.name: editBin2DData
proposedActions.options: { target?: UserId; source?: UserId; x?: FieldName; y?: FieldName; bins?: Bin2DBins; extent?: Bin2DExtent; includeEmpty?: boolean; members?: boolean; as?: DatasetBin2DOutputFields }
proposedActions.reason: Repeated create currently revises a logical owner but has no explicit partial-edit vocabulary.

proposedActions.name: editFacetScales
proposedActions.reason: Facet scale resolution is stable composition intent with no post-create edit path.

proposedActions.name: editFacetGuides
proposedActions.reason: Outer axes and shared legend ownership cannot be revised after facet creation.

parameterExtensions.contract: Dispatch stroke-width targets and support title, count, labels, and titleStyle; keep current right-side placement boundary.
Add channels?: LegendChannel[]; omission preserves whole-target removal and a combined block requires its complete channel set.
line, ticks, labels, ticksAndLabels, and title accept false to remove existing selected components.
Add statistics?: { center?: IntervalCenter; extent?: IntervalExtent; level?: number } for statistical owners only.
Add statistics?: { center?: IntervalCenter; extent?: IntervalExtent; level?: number } and boundaries?: false | ErrorBandBoundaryAppearance.
Add source?: UserId, field?: FieldName, groupBy?: FieldName | false while retaining density channel, output fields, coordinate and scale IDs.
Add data?: UserId, x?: FieldName, y?: FieldName, groupBy?: FieldName | false and retain owner/component IDs and coordinate/scale IDs.
Add data?: UserId, x?: BoxPlotPositionChannel, y?: BoxPlotPositionChannel with complete orientation preflight.
Add data?: UserId, x?: GradientPlotPositionChannel, y?: GradientPlotPositionChannel with complete orientation preflight.
Add columns?: PositiveInteger for facet compositions only; concat compositions reject it.
stroke accepts false, removes stored stroke and width, and rejects simultaneous strokeWidth.
stroke accepts false, disables the default outline and stored width, and rejects simultaneous strokeWidth.

gateDecisions.reason: Avoid one mechanical action per channel while keeping graphical radius distinct from semantic Polar radius.
Remove dependent guide/layout/highlight state but preserve source datasets, coordinates and scale resources.
Target replacement changes mark-specific grain and style compatibility and remains recreate-only.
A highlight depends on a selection while a selection can exist without a highlight.
Preserve current channel vocabulary without exposing internal legend config kinds or silently splitting a combined block.
All statistical and Bin2D changes preserve immutable datasets and visible dependency trace.
Avoid a persisted schema change and reuse the existing facet derivation/replay boundary.
Direct removal catches target mistakes while aggregate false expresses a desired disabled state.
